sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30158" key="e)gkata/leiyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκατά-λειψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">residual symptom</tr_> (v. -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ληψις</itype>).</sense> </entryFree>
